description: Use your own Word templates to convert Markdown → DOCX/PDF/HTML from any MCP-compatible AI.
name: io.github.MDMagic-MCP/mdmagic-mcp-server

environmentVariables.description: Your personal MDMagic API key (format: mdmagic-XXXXXXXXXXXXXXXX). Get yours at https://mdmagic.ai/account — the 'Connect to AI Assistants via MCP' card on your account page generates the key and pre-fills a copy-pasteable config block.
environmentVariables.name: MDMAGIC_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Override the MDMagic API base URL. Defaults to https://api.mdmagic.ai. Only set this if you're running MDMagic against a local dev backend.
environmentVariables.name: MDMAGIC_BASE_URL

environmentVariables.description: Request timeout in milliseconds. Increase for very large documents on slow connections. Default: 30000 (30s).
environmentVariables.name: REQUEST_TIMEOUT

environmentVariables.description: Transport mode: 'stdio' (default, for local clients like Claude Desktop) or 'http' (for self-hosted Streamable HTTP).
environmentVariables.name: MCP_TRANSPORT

environmentVariables.description: Port for HTTP transport mode. Default: 3001. Only used when MCP_TRANSPORT=http.
environmentVariables.name: MCP_HTTP_PORT

environmentVariables.description: Bind address for HTTP transport mode. Default: 127.0.0.1. Only used when MCP_TRANSPORT=http.
environmentVariables.name: MCP_HTTP_HOST
